developer.name: City of South Fulton IT Department

shortDescription.default: City of South Fulton Employee Intranet v4 — native SharePoint experience with branded footer and Departments Grid

longDescription.default: COSF Intranet v4: Native SharePoint header/nav/search/user. Custom footer Application Customizer (links editable via SP list). Departments Grid web part (18 departments, searchable 3-col cards). All pages use native Hero, News, and Quick Links web parts for full SharePoint editability.

features.title: COSF Intranet Footer Extension
features.description: Application Customizer that injects the COSF branded footer on every page. Footer links are editable via the 'Intranet Footer Links' SharePoint list — no code deployment needed.

features.title: COSF Departments Grid Web Part
features.description: Searchable 3-column card grid of all 18 city departments. Reads from Department Directory list with demo fallback.
